## etude retro nudge dismiss

Snooze the retro nudge for the next N bead(s) (default 1)

### Synopsis

Records a snooze in .git/etude/retro-nudge-snooze.json. The snooze silences the nudge while runs-since-last-retro grows by fewer than --for more beads. A new retro automatically invalidates the snooze.

```
etude retro nudge dismiss [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --for int   snooze the nudge for the next N completed bead(s) before reminding again (default 1)
  -h, --help      help for dismiss
```

### SEE ALSO

* [etude retro nudge](etude_retro_nudge.md)	 - Manage the retro overdue reminder (nudge)
